details: The agent executed all necessary tool calls (get PR details, get status, get comments, get review comments, get check runs), correctly identified the title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', author joshavant, summarized the PR body accurately, reported CI results with 19 success/4 failure/7 skipped out of 41 total checks, and summarized the single Greptile bot comment. All data matches the tool outputs with no hallucination.
